positive: An intricate, highly detailed illustration of a stylized celestial mountain range meeting a futuristic cityscape at twilight. The mountains are drawn with clean, bold, graphic linework, showing ancient stone mixed with bioluminescent crystal veins, forming sharp, dynamic peaks. The cityscape below is composed of geometric structures and glowing neon pathways, creating a harmonious contrast between natural wildness and advanced civilization. The style is neo-Victorian fantasy meets Art Deco futurism, rendered in a highly saturated, limited color palette of deep sapphire blue, brilliant gold, emerald green, and electric violet. The composition must be centralized, focusing on the interlocking silhouettes of the peaks and towers, maintaining strong negative space suitable for a vertical or square print print design. Volumetric lighting emphasizes sharp contrast and dramatic shadows. Clean vector art aesthetic, ultra-detailed illustration, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
